# third_party/tomlplusplus/

Vendored `toml++` parser assets used by the runtime content loader.

## Usage
- Read this file before scanning the folder in detail.
- When files or folders in this directory change, update this file in the same change.

## Contents
- `LICENSE`: Upstream MIT license for `toml++`.
- `README.md`: Upstream project overview and usage notes from `toml++`.
- `toml.hpp`: Vendored single-header TOML parser used by `src/content/content_loader.cpp`.
